topic.name: What to expect from the brand
topic.briefing:
A "What to Expect When Buying from Us" email is a way to provide customers with a clear understanding of the buying process and what they can expect when they make a purchase from your brand. This type of email is designed to set customer expectations, ensure a positive buying experience, and build trust and loyalty.
Provide information on shipping and delivery: Share details on shipping and delivery options, including estimated delivery times and costs.
Explain returns and exchanges: Clearly outline your company's return and exchange policy, including how customers can initiate a return or exchange and what the process entails.
Highlight customer service: Let customers know how they can contact customer service, and what kind of support they can expect.
Emphasize the benefits of buying from you: Highlight the unique benefits of buying from your company, such as a wide selection of products, competitive pricing, fast shipping, money-back guarantee, free returns.
The goal of this email is to provide customers with a clear understanding of the buying process when purchasing from your brand. This email is designed to set customer expectations, ensure a positive buying experience, build trust and loyalty, and provide customers with important information about shipping and delivery, returns and exchanges, customer service, and the benefits of buying from your company.

copy.subject: Was dich bei uns erwartet ⚡
copy.preview: Transparenz statt Marketing-Blabla. So läuft's bei Razeco ab.
copy.headline: Keine Überraschungen. Nur Klartext.
body: Andere Brands versprechen dir das Blaue vom Himmel. Wir sagen dir einfach, wie's läuft.
Bestellt bis 14 Uhr → Versand am selben Tag. DHL bringt's in 1-2 Werktagen zu dir. Kostenloser Versand ab 35€, darunter 4,99€.
30 Tage Geld-zurück-Garantie. Ohne Wenn und Aber. Einfach eine Mail an hello@razeco.com und wir regeln das unkompliziert.
Echte Menschen, keine Bots. Antworten innerhalb von 24h. WhatsApp, Mail oder Instagram – such dir aus, was dir passt.
✓ Made in Germany, Designed in Switzerland
✓ As seen in FAZ, Handelsblatt, Tagesspiegel
Kein Marketing-Geschwätz. Nur Premium-Qualität, die hält was sie verspricht.
